title: Avatar (disambiguation)
content:
'''Avatar''' can refer to:
==Canon==
*'''[[Avatar-10]]''', a [[Corellian]]-built [[Hyperdrive|hyperdrive]]
==Legends==
*'''''[[Avatar]]''''', a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]
*'''''[[Avatar Orbital Platform]]''''', used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Slaver/Legends|slavers]] for [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] slave trade
*'''[[Avatar-10/Legends|Avatar-10 hyperdrive]]''', a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]]-built [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]
*'''[[Avatar (technology)|Avatar]]''', technology
*'''[[Avatar's Needle]]''', a [[Light cruiser|light cruiser]] owned by [[Shanto Dhil]]
*'''[[Avatar Monthly]]''', a magazine that circulated during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
==Out of Universe==
*'''[[Avatar Rising]]''', a tournament sanctioned by [[RPGA]]

{{Disambig}}

|de=Avatar (Begriffsklärung)
}}
